subcodes.first_line: O Abu'l-Qásim! The sowers, aided by divine confirmation and grace, have scattered their seeds, and through the waters of the All-Merciful's bounty they have flourished [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالقاسم زارعین بتایید و توفیق الهی تخم کشته اند و از آب رحمت رحمانی نمو
subcodes.subjects: @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
